description: Major IDM (Integrated Device Manufacturer) pursuing foundry transformation via IDM 2.0 strategy. Produces CPUs for PCs and servers, discrete GPUs, and offers foundry services. Targeting Intel 18A process for leadership recovery.

_externalRelationships.notes: IDM 2.0: 'five nodes in four years'. $8.5B CHIPS Act funding. Targeting #2 foundry by 2030. Largest Lasertec EUV inspection install base (14 units).

_metadata.notes: 2026 revenue forecast $53.77B (+3.4% YoY). Three segments: CCG, DCAI, Intel Foundry. Stock up 161% in 12 months.
